zh.Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife於1118年出生在蘇格蘭費伏梅爾爾時，他的父親Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife30歲，母親Countess Constance Buchan38歲。他和Ada Huntingdon至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1154年在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林享年36歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏吉卡爾迪。

zh-hans.Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland: 英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife于1118年出生在苏格兰費伏梅爾爾时，他的父亲Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife30岁，母亲Countess Constance Buchan38岁。他和Ada Huntingdon至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1154年在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林享年36岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏吉卡爾迪。

nameMeanings.name: MacDuff
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDuff
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duibh, a patronymic from the personal name or byname Dubh ‘black, dark-haired, swarthy’. Compare Duff .

nameMeanings.name: Duncan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

variants.name: Donnchadh
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

nameMeanings.name: "Donnchad"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

variants.name: Duncan
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

en.lifeSummary: When Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife was born in 1118, in Methilhill, Fife, Scotland, his father, Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife, was 30 and his mother, Countess Constance Buchan, was 38. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Ada Huntingdon. He died in 1154, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife est né en 1118, à Methilhill, Fife, Écosse, son père, Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Countess Constance Buchan, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Ada Huntingdon. Il est décédé en 1154, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Kirkcaldy, Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife 1118 in Methilhill, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife 30 und seine Mutter Countess Constance Buchan 38. Er hatte mit Ada Huntingdon mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1154 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife è nato il nel 1118 nel Methilhill, Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Countess Constance Buchan, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Ada Huntingdon. Morì nel 1154, nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fifeが1118年にスコットランドフィフメスイルヒルで生まれた時，父Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fifeは30歳，母Countess Constance Buchanは38歳であった。彼はAda Huntingdonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1154年にイギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインで36歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフキルクカルディにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife(이)가 1118년 스컷랜드 피프 멧힐힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Constance Buchan(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Ada Huntingdon(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1154년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 커크캘디에 묻혔다.

mn.Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland: Dunfermline, Fib, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife nasceu em 1118, em Methilhill, Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Countess Constance Buchan, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Ada Huntingdon. Ele faleceu em 1154, em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife родился в 1118 г. в местности метилхилл, фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Constance Buchan, 38. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Ada Huntingdon. Он умер в 1154 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности кирккалди, фиф, Шотландия.

sm.about 1140: mai le e tusa o le 1144 e o'o I le 1163
sm.from 1113 to 1154: mai le 1113 e o'o I le 1154

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife nació en 1118, en Methilhill, Fife, Scotland, su papá, Gillemichael MacDuff Mórmaer of Fife, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Countess Constance Buchan, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Ada Huntingdon. Murió en 1154, en Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland.
